theoryTeaser.headline: THEORY? SORTED.
theoryTeaser.subheadline: App + live lessons. No cramming — we get you exam-ready.

team.heading: THE TEAM
team.maryoText: I love supporting people on their way to getting their license. As an experienced entrepreneur, it's important to me to create a family atmosphere where everyone feels welcome. At Maryo's it's about you – we want you to drive safely and with confidence.
team.juliusText: For me, driving school means supporting real people and creating structure where others only see process. We're experienced entrepreneurs who do what we love – and it shows. Our goal: a place where everyone feels at home and reaches their goal.

howItWorks.heading: THE ROAD TO YOUR LICENSE
howItWorks.step1Desc: In 5 minutes — choose instructor, choose class, done.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Apple Pay, Google Pay, Sofort or Klarna — on your phone.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Flexible Mon–Fri, evenings too. We adapt to you.
howItWorks.step4Desc: With your chosen instructor, in your language, at your pace.
howItWorks.step5Desc: We prepare you — TÜV test included.
howItWorks.step6Desc: The goal. Your license in your hand.

priceCalculator.heading: WHAT DOES YOUR LICENSE COST?
priceCalculator.disclaimer: Driving lessons vary by individual need. This is an estimate.
priceCalculator.ctaSub: Register now & secure your preferred instructor →

pricing.heading: FAIR PRICES. NO SURPRISES.
pricing.disclaimer: Driving lessons are billed as needed. Registration fee due on sign-up. All prices incl. VAT. Installment payment via Klarna available.

faq.heading: FAQ
faq.q1Q: How many driving lessons do I need?
faq.q1A: It depends on your experience. On average 30–45 lessons for class B.
faq.q2Q: What does the license cost in total?
faq.q2A: In Mönchengladbach total cost for class B is typically €2,000–3,000, depending on lessons.
faq.q3Q: Can I change my preferred instructor after signing up?
faq.q3A: Yes, just get in touch — we'll find a solution.
faq.q4Q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.q4A: Apple Pay, Google Pay, Sofort (Klarna), Klarna installments, and card.
faq.q5A: Yes! Via Klarna you can pay in 3 installments — no interest.
faq.q6Q: Can I be taught in Arabic, Turkish or Russian?
faq.q7A: We'll contact you within 24h at 0178 4557528 and go through next steps.
faq.q8A: Mon–Fri 12:00–18:00. Bahnhofstraße 25, 41236 Mönchengladbach. Messages & appointments: green buttons bottom-right on the site; phone: 0178 4557528
faq.q9Q: Can I sign up for BF17 / accompanied driving?
faq.q9A: Yes, from 17 with an eligible accompanying person.

contact.heading: VISIT US
contact.floatActionsHint: WhatsApp and booking a slot: use the green quick-action buttons bottom-right (chat and calendar). For calls see phone above.

registration.heading: REGISTRATION
registration.referrerCodeHint: Referred by a friend? Enter their code here – they get a €15 Amazon voucher once you've paid.
registration.referralCodeSuccessHint: Share it with friends. When someone registers with your code and pays, you get a €15 Amazon voucher.
registration.referralLookupNotFound: No referral code found for this email.
registration.hasLicence: I already have a driver's license (other country/class)
registration.offerStandardDesc: One-time registration + learning app. Book driving lessons as usual after signing up.
registration.offerBundleDesc: You pay registration + app plus {price} € × 9 lessons. One lesson is included as a promo (10 hours total).
registration.paymentExplainerBundle: This package reserves 10 lesson hours in billing; one hour counts as a promotional offer. Scheduling is with the school as usual.
registration.successMessage: We'll get back to you soon. Questions? Call 0178 4557528.
